title: Rigorous bounds on transport from causality
author_string: Michal P. Heller, Alexandre Serantes, Michał Spaliński, Benjamin Withers
abstract: We use causality to derive a number of simple and universal constraints on dispersion relations, which describe the location of singularities of retarded two-point functions in relativistic quantum field theories. We prove that all causal dissipative dispersion relations have a finite radius of convergence. We then give two-sided bounds on all transport coefficients in units of this radius, including an upper bound on diffusivity.
comment: 4 pages. New relational bound on sound attenuation, improved test function, references added
